meaning: n.(唱片等的) 凹槽,惯例,最佳状态vt.开槽于
examples: The cupboard door slides open along the groove.
We are all unique, so we have to find our own groove and start listening to ourselves.
My life seems to be in a groove, I do the same things day after day.
Introducing her to a sport at a young age can help her get in the groove.
At times, it sounds huge, like a dozen people locked in a perfect groove.
